sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Duke Energy는 2025 회계연도에 86억 2,600만 달러의 영업이익을 기록하며 공급망 리스크와 규제 환경 속에서 사업 전략을 추진 중입니다.

keyPoints.text: 전력 인프라 수요 증가와 국제 무역 환경 변화가 공급망 안정성에 영향을 미치고 있습니다.
행동주의 주주들의 활동이 경영 방향성에 대한 불확실성을 야기하여 전략 실행 및 인재 확보에 영향을 줄 수 있습니다.
2025 회계연도 실적은 규제 메커니즘 내에서 허용된 비용 범위와 자본 계획 실행 능력에 따라 변동될 수 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: 공급망 차질, 인플레이션, 관세 및 희토류 수출 제한 등이 핵심 장비 조달 지연과 비용 상승을 유발하고 있습니다.
행동주의 주주들의 위임장 대결이나 주주 제안이 경영진의 전략 실행을 방해하고 주가 변동성을 확대할 위험이 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 전력 인프라 현대화 목표 달성을 위해 자본 프로젝트를 추진 중이나, 외부 공급망 제약이 프로젝트 일정에 변수로 작용하고 있습니다.
GAAP 기준 재무제표 외에도 조정된 이익(adjusted earnings) 등 비GAAP 지표를 활용하여 경영 성과를 관리하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025 회계연도 영업이익은 86억 2,600만 달러, 순이익은 49억 6,800만 달러를 기록했습니다.
총자산은 1,957억 3,600만 달러이며, 현금및현금성자산은 2억 4,500만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 공급망 리스크가 자본 지출 효율성에 미치는 영향과 행동주의 주주 대응에 따른 경영권 안정성 확보 여부를 지속적으로 모니터링해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: FY2025 operating income = 86억 2,600만 달러 (USD 8.626B; 8,626 million), XBRL range 2025-01-01..2025-12-31.
FY2025 net income = 49억 6,800만 달러 (USD 4.968B; 4,968 million), XBRL range 2025-01-01..2025-12-31.
FY2025 total assets = 1,957억 3,600만 달러 (USD 195.736B; 195,736 million), XBRL range instant..2025-12-31.
FY2025 cash and cash equivalents = 2억 4,500만 달러 (USD 0.245B; 245 million), XBRL range instant..2025-12-31.

Risks Related to Supply Chain Disruptions, Inflation, Tariffs and Foreign Export Restrictions Duke Energy’s operations and capital projects are exposed to supply chain disruptions, inflation, tariffs and export restrictions. These factors may increase costs, extend lead times for critical equipment and/or delay construction and maintenance activities. Rising demand for electric infrastructure and international trade developments, including potential export controls on certain rare earth materials and technologies used in electric utility infrastructure, may further constrain supply availability. These risks may result in higher costs than estimated or than allowed under approved regulatory mechanisms and could impact our financial results, capital plan execution or our ability to deliver on system modernization goals. Fluctuations in commodity prices or availability may adversely affect

Our business could be negatively affected as a result of actions of activist shareholders. While we strive to maintain constructive communications with our shareholders, activist shareholders may, from time to time, engage in proxy solicitations or advance shareholder proposals, or otherwise attempt to affect changes and assert influence on our Board and management. Perceived uncertainties as to the future direction or governance of the Company may cause concern to our current or potential regulators, vendors or strategic partners, or make it more difficult to execute on our strategy or to attract and retain qualified personnel, which may have a material impact on our business and operating results. In addition, actions such as those described above could cause fluctuations in the trading price of our common stock, based on temporary or speculative market perceptions or other factors tha

MD&A DUKE ENERGY ITEM 7. MANAGEMENT’S DISCUSSION AND ANALYSIS OF FINANCIAL CONDITION AND RESULTS OF OPERATIONS Management’s Discussion and Analysis includes financial information prepared in accordance with GAAP in the U.S., as well as certain non-GAAP financial measures such as adjusted earnings and adjusted EPS discussed below. Generally, a non-GAAP financial measure is a numerical measure of financial performance, financial position or cash flows that excludes (or includes) amounts that are included in (or excluded from) the most directly comparable measure calculated and presented in accordance with GAAP. The non-GAAP financial measures should be viewed as a supplement to, and not a substitute for, financial measures presented in accordance with GAAP.
